description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded in InVesalius. A trauma surgeon needs 'thick slab' reconstructions to simulate plain-film X-rays for a fracture assessment. Create thick-slab reconstructions with a slice thickness of at least 40.0 mm for both the Coronal and Sagittal views. Export the Coronal thick-slab view as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/coronal_thick_slab.png and the Sagittal thick-slab view as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/sagittal_thick_slab.png. Login credentials (if needed): username 'ga', password 'password123'.
